Yi-Large

★★★★☆ 1000 calls per month Paid from: Pay-as-you-go pricing, starting from approximately $10/month

A powerful large language model developed by 01.AI for various AI applications and tasks.

Key Features

  • High-performance computing
  • Multi-language support
  • Long context handling
  • Easy API integration

Pros

  • High accuracy and effectiveness
  • Fast processing speed
  • Strong documentation and community support

Cons

  • Requires technical knowledge for integration
  • Limited free usage credits

Tips

  • Suitable for developing AI-related applications
  • Be mindful of API usage limits when in use
